title: Update all edhoc_kdf callsites, transcript handling, and remove conflicting code in edhoc.rs
description: Fix callsites (lines ~638-752, 827+), make consistent with new KDF (prk, th, label, context, length). Resolve duplicate implementations visible in the file (one using u8 labels, another string). Ensure TH_2/TH_3/TH_4 computation matches Python.
